name: testSortByCreationDate
description: 'Creation Date' column sorts descending by default and ascending on click.

steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0812.234121.26.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

steps.name: Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Verify: transactions are sorted by creation date in descending order by default
Click sort icon in 'Creation Date (GMT)' column
Verify: transactions are sorted by creation date in ascending after clicking the sort icon
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
